image review metadata preserved on assets for the post-generation image pass.

reviewOnlyQuestions.question: The ZOZO corporate release states that seven ZOZOTOWN collaboration goods types were sold, but the visible release text itemizes four featured original goods groups. Should Codex inspect the special page archive or product-level ZOZOTOWN pages before claiming the full seven-type original-goods lineup?
The current ZOZOTOWN special page may only show that the special event has ended. Should the archive rely on the ZOZO corporate release as the primary evidence for item facts?
The brand apparel collections contain multiple apparel SKUs with size/color/variant complexity. Should future versions split apparel into individual item pages or keep brand-level grouped pages?
